request.prompt: a panel to revoke a teammate's access to the workspace

children.text: Are you sure you want to revoke all access for [Teammate Name] from the workspace? This action is irreversible and will remove their ability to view or edit any content.

components.title: Confirm Revocation of Access?
components.description: Are you sure you want to revoke all access for [Teammate Name] from the workspace? This action is irreversible and will remove their ability to view or edit any content.
